productDisplayName: Nike Men Flyclave Ltr White Casual Shoes
description: The nike Flyclave Leather is a no-fuss sneaker with an ultra slim profile. It features a leather and suede upper, an extremely sleek EVA midsole and a rubber outsole, making it a great tennis shoe.UpperLeather and suede upper for durability and comfortPerforated upper in swoosh pattern on the side panels and on the upper for maximum ventilationSymmetrical lacing system for snug FitCotton twill laces for comfort and durabilityLightly padded tongue for enhanced comfortReinforced suede overlay along toe box to protect the forefootMidsoleCushioned footbed for all-day comfort and impact protectionEVA midsole for durability and absolute shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for maximum stability and tractionWash careDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
